listings.title: Paititi Violin with case
listings.body: Up for sale is a nice violin barely used in great condition. The ad will be removed once sold, please don’t if it’s still available.

listings.title: Drum set
listings.body: Jazz drums set for $350 or best offer. Needs to go soon.

listings.title: New Gator LP Hardshell Case
listings.body: New Gator LP Hardshell Case Purchased a week ago to transport a Les Paul from New Hampshire to NY. No shipping, checks, money orders, no CL nonsense.

listings.title: ZT Lunchbox 2 guitar amp amplifier good
listings.body: Works great! IYKYK - very loud, very portable, can power a 4x12 no problem. For some reason this one says "reverb" on it - it is more like the ambience knob on others. It is not the new version with an actual reverb circuit.
